author: Aparna Sivanandam
name: Mini-Hymba Single Hybrid Attention/SSM Layer
technique_summary: Single Mini-Hymba hybrid attention/SSM layer at layer 4, 4 attention heads + 4 Mamba-lite SSM heads, 4 meta tokens, signed chunk-parallel fp32 SSM scan, standard tokenizer-aware BPB and int8+zlib export path.
notes: Non-record architecture experiment. The one-layer chunk-parallel Mini-Hymba variant reached 1.4753 BPB after int8+zlib roundtrip in 800 single-GPU steps. A future 8xH100 sp8192 run is the natural record-track test.
